creator: clsung@tw.FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Stefan.

    I have problems on testing these two p5-Thread-* ports.
    Is there a convenient way to detect where perl is built with
    thread support on port build phrase? (run-time?)

On Fri, Dec 19, 2008 at 08:56:49AM +0100, Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi clsung,
> 
> there hasn't been an update on this PR for quite a while now. I'm trying
> to find out what the state of this is - are you working on adding this
> port?
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan

-- 
Alan Cheng-Lung Sung - clsung@
